title: ortholoma domingense
intro: Ortholoma domingense is a flowering plant species native to the Dominican Republic, also known as the 'Coral Honeysuckle'. The medicinal properties of Ortholoma domingense include its antiseptic, antifungal, and antibacterial properties, making it effective against various infections and wounds. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to treat sore throats, coughs, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Ortholoma domingense can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
